subject: docs: comprehensive codebase documentation with user flows and pitfalls
body:
Full codebase audit documenting all functionality, user flows, and
potential pitfalls. Covers core concepts, all 10 user flows (first visit,
workspace management, CRUD, graph interaction, search/filter, timeline,
import/export, analysis, PWA), feature reference (keyboard shortcuts,
accessibility, data storage), architecture overview, and 36 identified
pitfalls across data persistence, graph interaction, search, import,
workspaces, views, analysis, PWA, and general UX.

Tags: docs, codebase, audit, user-flows, pitfalls
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
